query: World Bank Vietnam population 2024 estimate million
answer: Vietnam's population in 2024 is estimated at 101.3 million. This figure is based on recent projections from the World Bank and United Nations. The population has been steadily increasing over the past decade.

results.title: Vietnam Population (million) - FocusEconomics
results.snippet: The population of Vietnam was 101.3million in 2024, compared to 90.7 a decade earlier. Vietnam Population Chart. Select a country.

results.title: Viet Nam Population 2025 - United Nations Population Fund
results.snippet: Total population in millions, 2025: 101.6. Population annual doubling time, years, 2025: 118. Population aged 0-14, per cent, 2025: 23.
